title: API keys
createdHeading: Key shown only once – copy it now!
newKeyPlaceholder: Name of the consumer (e.g. "Live ticker ABC")
colRealtimeTitle: Real-time access: live scores and events are delivered unfiltered
footnote: Real-time: live scores and game events unfiltered. Without real-time: scores of ongoing games are hidden. Limit/min: max. requests per minute (empty = unlimited).

notifications.loadError: API keys could not be loaded.
notifications.rateLimitInvalid: Rate limit must be a positive number or empty (= unlimited).
